lines.text: Hi Sarah, welcome back. I can see you called two days ago about a double charge on order ORD-4521. Let me check on the status of your refund.
Oh wow, yes, that's exactly right. Has the refund been processed?
It looks like the refund was processed yesterday. Can you check your account to confirm you see it?
Let me check... yes, I see it. Thank you so much for following up.
